templates.name: Cookie Banner Dismisser
templates.description: Automatically clicks common cookie consent/accept buttons on page load.

scripts.name: Cookie Banner Dismisser

templates.name: Video Navigator
templates.description: Binds N and P keys to navigate to next/previous video on YouTube and Vimeo.

templates.name: Element Hider
templates.description: Hides page elements matching a CSS selector. Configure the selector to target ads, banners, or other unwanted elements.

cssRules.name: Element Hider Rule

templates.name: Dark Mode Injector
templates.description: Inverts page colors for a dark mode effect. Images are un-inverted to preserve their appearance.

cssRules.name: Dark Mode Inversion

templates.name: Auto-Clicker
templates.description: Clicks a target element at a configurable interval. Set the selector and interval to automate repetitive clicking.

scripts.name: Auto-Clicker
scripts.description: Clicks the configured selector on an interval. Edit SELECTOR and INTERVAL_MS to customize.
